g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an onshore oil well work?')
sendPrompt('How does an offshore oil platform work?')
sendPrompt('What is shale oil and how is it extracted?')
sendPrompt('What happens at a crude oil gathering hub?')
sendPrompt('How do crude oil pipelines work and where do they deliver to?')
sendPrompt('How does crude oil maritime shipping work — tanker types and routes?')
sendPrompt('When is rail or truck used to move crude oil?')
sendPrompt('What are crude oil storage tanks and strategic petroleum reserves?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside an oil refinery — distillation, cracking, FCC?')
